title: SWD Club Fixtures
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Premier League fixture...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Premier League fixture between Sussex and Knysna Cavaliers at D’Almeida promises to be a mouthwatering clash this weekend.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Premier League fixture between Sussex and Knysna Cavaliers at D’Almeida promises to be a mouthwatering clash this weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Pacaltsdorp, who is the top performer this season, will host Harlequins while New Dawn Park will have the opportunity to move away from the bottom of the log when they take on George at Rooirivierrif."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The semi-finals in the Reserve Division 1 and 2 competition is scheduled for the weekend.","html":"The semi-finals in the Reserve Division 1 and 2 competition is scheduled for the weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The complete list of fixtures are:","html":"The complete list of fixtures
